landingIntro1: Kako bismo vašu prijavu obradili individualno, potrebni su nam potpuni i detaljni opisi.
landingIntro2: Molimo koristite i odgovarajuća polja za napomene. Na svako od sljedećih pitanja mora osobno i istinito odgovoriti osoba koja se osigurava ili njezin zakonski zastupnik.
landingIntro3: Nepotpuni ili netočni podaci smatraju se povredom obveze prijave. Posljedica može biti raskid ugovora ili isključenje prava na naknade.
landingIntro4: Helsana će vaše podatke obrađivati povjerljivo i neće ih prosljeđivati trećim stranama. Molimo ne ostavljajte polja za napomene prazna.

landing.intro1: So that we can review your application individually, we rely on complete and detailed information.
landing.intro2: Please also use the remark fields provided. Each of the following questions must be answered personally and truthfully by the person to be insured or by their legal representative.
landing.intro3: Incomplete or incorrect information is considered a breach of the duty to disclose. This may result in termination of the contract or exclusion of benefits.
landing.intro4: Helsana will treat your data confidentially and will not share it with third parties. Please do not leave any remark fields blank.

dental.legendTitle: Condition of the teeth - please enter the following details in the dental chart
dental.prosthesesConditionLabel: Condition of crowns, bridges and prostheses

dental.parodontitisInstruction1: Pockets with a depth of 4 mm or more
dental.parodontitisInstruction2: TM = tooth mobility with grades 1, 2, 3 and 4
dental.additionalQuestionsTitle: 18. Additional questions about the condition of the teeth
dental.desiredLevelHint: U osiguranje stomatološkog liječenja primaju se samo osobe sa saniranim zubima kojima nije potrebno liječenje.

questions.q1: Have applications already been rejected, postponed or accepted only under more difficult conditions by SWICA or other insurers? (e.g. coverage exclusion, risk surcharge or premium increase, rejection of the application)
questions.q1a: If yes, why and based on which diagnosis?
questions.q1b: Do complaints still exist or are treatments still ongoing?
questions.q4: In the last 12 months, or currently, have you been in treatment, under medical supervision or undergone examinations (e.g. medical, cosmetic, plastic surgery, special education, psychiatric, preventive, psychological, dental, physiotherapy or complementary / alternative / naturopathic treatments, checks, assessments or procedures, etc.)?
questions.q4b: Do complaints still exist or are treatments still ongoing?
questions.q5: In the last 10 years, have you had illnesses / disorders / complaints, or have these been medically diagnosed and / or treated therapeutically? If yes, which ones?
questions.q6: Have you ever suffered from a tumor disease, a slipped disc, a mental illness or a cardiovascular disease? If yes, from what?
questions.q7: Have you ever had an implant or a foreign body inserted?
questions.q8: Have you ever had an outpatient or inpatient procedure / operation? If yes, why?
questions.q9: Do you suffer from a congenital defect or do you receive a UVG or IV pension?
questions.q9a: If yes, which congenital defect (including number) or what is the reason for the pension?
questions.q10: Is there a dental or jaw malposition and / or is an assessment, treatment or orthodontic correction planned because of it, or has a suspicion been expressed?
questions.q10a: Are orthodontic treatments to be expected?
questions.q11: For women: Is there a pregnancy?
questions.q12: Do / did you regularly take medication or food supplements in the last 5 years?
questions.q12a: If yes, why and based on which diagnosis?
questions.q13: Do you currently or have you ever regularly consumed nicotine, alcohol, drugs or similar substances?
questions.q18_2: When was the last treatment completed and for what reason?
questions.q18_3: When did you first treat your patient?
questions.q18_4: When did the examination for the dental insurance take place?
questions.q18_5: Are there any accident-related dental injuries?
questions.q18_6: If yes, which teeth are affected?
questions.q18_7: If yes, which treatments have been carried out or which treatments are still pending?
questions.q18_8: Are dental procedures planned or required within the next twelve months, e.g. surgical procedures, dentures or orthodontic treatments?
questions.q18_10: When will this treatment be carried out?
questions.q18_11: Why could the treatment not be carried out earlier?

review.completeText: Vaša medicinska i stomatološka zdravstvena deklaracija spremna je za pregled.
